title: Traditional German Bauernfrühstück
description: A hearty German peasant breakfast dish made with potatoes, eggs, and sauerkraut, cooked in a flavorful broth.
instructions: Bring the broth to a boil in a large pot.
Add the diced potatoes and cook until they're slightly tender.
Crack in the eggs and stir gently to distribute them evenly.
Add the sauerkraut on top of the eggs and cover the pot.
Simmer for 5-7 minutes, or until the eggs are cooked to your desired doneness.
Season with German boiling salt to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
